tokens.text: My name is Diego
but everyone calls me Dig

translation.text: mas todo mundo me chama de Dig

tokens.text: I grew up in a tiny town in the Midwest

translation.text: Eu cresci em uma pequena cidade no meio-oeste

tokens.text: When I was a child
in order to go to the nearest beach

translation.text: para ir à praia mais próxima

tokens.text: my family would have to drive
for hours and hours
but we never traveled to the beach

translation.text: mas nunca viajávamos para a praia

tokens.text: or anywhere else
for that matter
There was no public swimming pool nearby

translation.text: Não havia piscina pública por perto

tokens.text: and none of my friends had a pool at home

translation.text: e nenhum dos meus amigos tinha piscina em casa

tokens.text: When it came to water bodies

translation.text: Quando se tratava de corpos d'água

tokens.text: there was only a little brook
behind a group of trees

translation.text: atrás de um grupo de árvores

tokens.text: that was too small to be called a grove

translation.text: que era pequeno demais para ser chamado de bosque

tokens.text: and an artificial fishpond

translation.text: e um viveiro de peixes artificial

tokens.text: in a rich neighbor's backyard

translation.text: no quintal de um vizinho rico

tokens.text: but he was not very friendly

translation.text: mas ele não era muito amigável

tokens.text: so we never went near it

translation.text: então nunca chegávamos perto dele (do viveiro)

tokens.text: However
when I was around eleven years old

translation.text: quando eu tinha cerca de onze anos de idade

tokens.text: my mother became terrified of me drowning

translation.text: minha mãe ficou aterrorizada de que eu me afogasse

tokens.text: I had never thought about swimming anywhere

translation.text: Eu nunca havia pensado em nadar em lugar nenhum

tokens.text: Beaches or pools were out of my reach

translation.text: Praias ou piscinas estavam fora do meu alcance

tokens.text: and I did not care about them

translation.text: e eu não me importava com elas

tokens.text: anyway
Like many other boys my age

translation.text: Como muitos outros garotos da minha idade

tokens.text: in that town in the middle of nowhere

translation.text: naquela cidade no meio do nada

tokens.text: I only cared about my bike

translation.text: eu só me importava com minha bicicleta

tokens.text: video games
and not getting into too much trouble

translation.text: e em não me meter em muitos problemas

tokens.text: It all started on a very cold Wednesday evening

translation.text: Tudo começou numa noite muito fria de quarta-feira

tokens.text: It was snowing outside
I was doing my homework

translation.text: Eu estava fazendo minha lição de casa

tokens.text: on a small desk in the living room

translation.text: em uma pequena escrivaninha na sala de estar

tokens.text: my dog Wolf was sleeping near me

translation.text: meu cachorro Lobo estava dormindo perto de mim

tokens.text: my little sister Rose was playing with her stuffed animals near Wolf

translation.text: minha irmã mais nova Rose estava brincando com seus bichos de pelúcia perto do Lobo

tokens.text: and my parents were watching the news on TV

translation.text: e meus pais estavam assistindo ao noticiário na TV

tokens.text: Most evenings were like that

translation.text: A maioria das noites era assim

tokens.text: and I loved it
The words from the TV
somehow
helped me concentrate on what I had to do

translation.text: me ajudavam a me concentrar no que eu tinha que fazer

tokens.text: It was something like
The police have arrested a man
who was involved
in several deals with arms dealers

translation.text: em vários negócios com traficantes de armas

tokens.text: Many bombs were dropped on the city

translation.text: Muitas bombas foram lançadas sobre a cidade

tokens.text: Several people were injured by flying debris

translation.text: Várias pessoas ficaram feridas pelos destroços

tokens.text: She is an activist
who advocates for sustainability
in Alaska's mining industry
Our home was also warm and cozy

translation.text: Nossa casa também era quentinha e aconchegante

tokens.text: I was not crazy about school or studying

translation.text: Eu não era louco pela escola ou por estudar

tokens.text: but I consistently got good grades

translation.text: mas eu tirava boas notas de forma consistente

tokens.text: I think I did well
because I loved those moments in our living room

translation.text: porque eu adorava aqueles momentos na nossa sala de estar

tokens.text: This substance slows down your reactions
A report of the company's earnings

translation.text: Um relatório dos lucros da empresa

tokens.text: is published annually
The woman gave evidence in court

translation.text: A mulher apresentou evidências no tribunal

tokens.text: against the alleged attacker
I felt safe having my parents so near me

translation.text: Sentia-me seguro por ter meus pais tão perto de mim

tokens.text: after they had worked all day long

translation.text: depois de terem trabalhado o dia todo

tokens.text: my father is an economist
and my mother is a nurse
I also felt that the bad news my parents were listening to

translation.text: Eu também sentia que as más notícias que meus pais ouviam

tokens.text: was so far away from our little town

translation.text: estavam tão longe da nossa pequena cidade

tokens.text: that I did not have to worry about anything

translation.text: que eu não precisava me preocupar com nada

tokens.text: The economy has declined sharply
in recent years
Troops were sent to the area

translation.text: Tropas foram enviadas para a área

tokens.text: to restore order
He readily agreed
to help the soldiers
However
that evening
the beautiful blonde anchor said something like

translation.text: a bela âncora loira disse algo como

tokens.text: A brother and sister
got hurt
in separate drowning incidents
this afternoon
That piece of news caught my attention
I imagined that family
then I imagined my parents
having to deal with my sister and me

translation.text: tendo que lidar com minha irmã e eu

tokens.text: hurt at the same time
and my stomach hurt
as if I had swallowed a stone

translation.text: como se eu tivesse engolido uma pedra

tokens.text: I was not usually affected by the news

translation.text: Geralmente eu não era afetado pelas notícias

tokens.text: because everything seemed to happen so far away from our calm little town

translation.text: porque tudo parecia acontecer muito longe da nossa pacata cidadezinha

tokens.text: but that one
hit too close to home

translation.text: era perto demais da minha realidade (e, por isso, me afetou)

tokens.text: It affected my mother, too
The following day
she announced something very important during dinner

translation.text: ela anunciou algo muito importante durante o jantar

tokens.text: Dig, you will start swimming classes next week

translation.text: Dig, você vai começar as aulas de natação na próxima semana

tokens.text: "What?" I asked
I thought I had heard wrong

translation.text: Achei que eu tinha ouvido errado

tokens.text: She could not have said "swimming classes

translation.text: Ela não podia ter dito “aulas de natação”

tokens.text: You will start swimming classes next week

translation.text: Você vai começar as aulas de natação na próxima semana

tokens.text: my mother repeated
I realized I had heard her right

translation.text: Percebi que eu tinha ouvido bem

tokens.text: she had indeed said "swimming classes."

translation.text: ela realmente tinha dito “aulas de natação”

tokens.text: I also realized I did not like the idea of taking swimming classes

translation.text: Eu também percebi que não gostava da ideia de fazer aulas de natação

tokens.text: I already played soccer at school, and I was good at it

translation.text: Eu já jogava futebol na escola e era bom nisso

tokens.text: I did not need any more exercise

translation.text: Eu não precisava de mais exercícios

tokens.text: "But why?" I asked
I think everyone should know how to swim

translation.text: Acho que todos deveriam saber nadar.

tokens.text: It could be a life-saving skill

translation.text: Poderia ser uma habilidade que salvaria vidas

tokens.text: she explained
and from her tone
I understood there was no point arguing against it

translation.text: entendi que não havia sentido argumentar contra isso

tokens.text: My heart sank

translation.text: Fiquei muito desapontado (literalmente: meu coração afundou)

tokens.text: Rose will start swimming lessons next year

translation.text: Rose começará aulas de natação no próximo ano

tokens.text: my mother added
Yeah!" Rose shouted
waving her fork above her head

translation.text: agitando seu garfo acima da cabeça

tokens.text: So, on a very cold Saturday morning

translation.text: Então, numa manhã de sábado muito fria

tokens.text: my mother drove all the way to the nearest city

translation.text: minha mãe dirigiu até a cidade mais próxima

tokens.text: for me to start swimming lessons

translation.text: para eu começar as aulas de natação

tokens.text: I was not happy with having to take lessons on a Saturday

translation.text: Eu não estava feliz em ter aulas aos sábados

tokens.text: I thought it was unfair
because I already took enough lessons during the week

translation.text: porque já tinha aulas suficientes durante a semana

tokens.text: Nevertheless
I had not anticipated
the terror I felt when I saw the pool

translation.text: o terror que senti ao ver a piscina

tokens.text: As soon as I entered the pool area

translation.text: Assim que entrei na área da piscina

tokens.text: I realized two things at once

translation.text: percebi duas coisas ao mesmo tempo

tokens.text: the pool was much bigger than I had imagined

translation.text: a piscina era muito maior do que eu tinha imaginado

tokens.text: and I was terrified of it

translation.text: e eu morria de medo dela

tokens.text: I did not feel the usual butterflies in my stomach

translation.text: Não senti as habituais borboletas no estômago

tokens.text: but cockroaches
It was like my stomach was full of cockroaches

translation.text: Era como se meu estômago estivesse cheio de baratas

tokens.text: swimming in the milk I had drunk that morning

translation.text: nadando no leite que eu tinha bebido naquela manhã

tokens.text: I wanted to throw up
and then run away from there
and I did not care if it meant

translation.text: e não me importava se isso significava

tokens.text: running in the snow wearing only swimming trunks

translation.text: correr na neve vestindo apenas calção de banho

tokens.text: Welcome to our swimming class

translation.text: Bem-vindo à nossa aula de natação

tokens.text: the instructor, a tall, strong, and very blond young man

translation.text: o instrutor, um jovem alto, forte e muito loiro

tokens.text: said with a big smile
My name is August
You're Diego, right
I did not reply
Well, I'm gonna do some window shopping

translation.text: Bem, vou dar uma olhada nas vitrines

tokens.text: See you later, Dig
my mom said, then disappeared
I was alone in hell
I looked at all that water
it was like the big mouth of a huge shark

translation.text: era como a boca grande de um tubarão enorme

tokens.text: full of huge, white teeth

translation.text: cheia de dentes enormes e brancos

tokens.text: waiting to eat me for breakfast

translation.text: esperando para me comer de café da manhã

tokens.text: Just looking at it
made me feel like I was drowning

translation.text: me fez sentir como se estivesse me afogando

tokens.text: I felt sick
Are you excited?
Let's get in
August said and
dove in headfirst
I just stood there
looking at him
and wishing my mother was already back

translation.text: e desejando que minha mãe já estivesse de volta

tokens.text: to pick me up
August waited for me for a while

translation.text: August esperou por mim um pouco

tokens.text: then he got out of the pool
and stood by my side
Is this your first time
in a pool this big
he asked
This is an Olympic-size swimming pool
so it holds 490,000 gallons of water

translation.text: então tem capacidade para 490 mil galões de água

tokens.text: he continued
He did not look like he was judging me

translation.text: Ele não parecia estar me julgando

tokens.text: I felt I could be honest with him

translation.text: senti que eu poderia ser honesto com ele

tokens.text: I am afraid
I've never been to a pool before

translation.text: Nunca estive em uma piscina antes

tokens.text: I admitted
Many people feel scared
when they start swimming
August said
But I'll tell you what

translation.text: Mas vou te dizer uma coisa

tokens.text: I'll give you some foam noodles

translation.text: Vou te dar alguns macarrões de espuma

tokens.text: and I won't leave your side

translation.text: e não vou sair do seu lado

tokens.text: Just get in
If it is still too much
then you tell me
and we can get out of the water
I did not want to enter the pool

translation.text: Eu não queria entrar na piscina

tokens.text: I did not want to be there
I wanted to be home playing video games

translation.text: eu queria estar em casa jogando videogame

tokens.text: Actually, I wanted to be home doing anything

translation.text: Na verdade, eu queria estar em casa fazendo qualquer coisa

tokens.text: even the dishes
but there I was
alone and terrified
and then a thought occurred

translation.text: e então me ocorreu um pensamento

tokens.text: there was only one way to get over my fear

translation.text: só havia uma maneira de superar o medo

tokens.text: learning how to swim
So, I took a deep breath
closed my eyes, and jumped in
August jumped in, too
gave me an orange pool noodle

translation.text: me deu um macarrão de piscina laranja

tokens.text: and told me to move my legs

translation.text: e me disse para mover as pernas

tokens.text: So, I did that for a while

translation.text: Então, eu fiz isso por um tempo

tokens.text: Soon, the water did not feel so scary anymore

translation.text: Logo, a água não parecia mais tão assustadora

tokens.text: It was warm, and it smelt funny

translation.text: Estava morna e tinha um cheiro estranho

tokens.text: but I was there
and I was still alive and breathing

translation.text: e ainda estava vivo e respirando

tokens.text: Now, keep moving your legs like that

translation.text: Agora, continue movendo as pernas assim

tokens.text: and try to get to the other side of the pool

translation.text: e tente chegar ao outro lado da piscina

tokens.text: Don't worry
I'll be nearby
August said
The other side of the pool looked too far away

translation.text: O outro lado da piscina parecia muito distante

tokens.text: but I decided to try
It was not easy
There was just too much water everywhere

translation.text: Havia muita água por toda parte

tokens.text: I even swallowed some

translation.text: eu até engoli um pouco (de água)

tokens.text: I was not wearing goggles

translation.text: Eu não estava usando óculos de proteção

tokens.text: so my eyes hurt a little

translation.text: então meus olhos doíam um pouco

tokens.text: But I went ahead
until the other side of the pool was just too close

translation.text: até que o outro lado da piscina estivesse perto demais

tokens.text: for me to give up
When I finally reached my goal
I felt good
Somehow
the pool seemed even less scary

translation.text: a piscina parecia ainda menos assustadora

tokens.text: Are you OK
August asked
Do you wanna try to go back?
"Yes," I said
But please stay by my side

translation.text: Mas por favor fique ao meu lado

tokens.text: I will!" August said
So, I went back and forth
with August by my side
for a while
and then he told me to go alone

translation.text: e então ele me disse para ir sozinho

tokens.text: If you need help
just call me
he said
I went back and forth alone for a while

translation.text: Eu fui e voltei sozinho por um tempo

tokens.text: until I looked up and saw my mother

translation.text: até que olhei para cima e vi minha mãe

tokens.text: The class was over
it was time for me to take a shower and go home

translation.text: era hora de tomar um banho e ir para casa

tokens.text: How was it?
my mother asked as we drove home

translation.text: minha mãe perguntou enquanto voltávamos para casa

tokens.text: It was OK
I replied
It was actually worse than I had anticipated

translation.text: Foi, na verdade, foi pior do que eu havia previsto

tokens.text: but also better than I had imagined

translation.text: mas também melhor do que eu havia imaginado

tokens.text: Life is complicated, isn't it?

translation.text: A vida é complicada, não é?

tokens.text: That afternoon, I felt extremely tired

translation.text: Naquela tarde, me senti extremamente cansado

tokens.text: but also relaxed
The following Saturday
I jumped into the pool as soon as I got there

translation.text: pulei na piscina assim que cheguei

tokens.text: and went back and forth by myself the whole time

translation.text: e fiquei indo e voltando sozinho o tempo todo

tokens.text: When summer came
I really enjoyed the swimming classes

translation.text: eu já gostava muito das aulas de natação

tokens.text: and I already knew two strokes
breaststroke and butterfly
Being able to swim felt amazing

translation.text: Ser capaz de nadar era incrível

tokens.text: The years passed
and I kept taking swimming classes

translation.text: e continuei fazendo aulas de natação

tokens.text: I became really good at it
and even took part in some competitions
and brought home some medals

translation.text: e trouxe para casa algumas medalhas

tokens.text: I became a real swimmer
Other things changed as well
a public pool was inaugurated in our town

translation.text: uma piscina pública foi inaugurada em nossa cidade

tokens.text: As a high school senior

translation.text: Como aluno do último ano do ensino médio

tokens.text: I got a job as a lifeguard at the local pool

translation.text: consegui um emprego como salva-vidas na piscina local

tokens.text: It was wonderful having a job
I felt mature and respected
I also needed the money to buy a new video game

translation.text: Eu também precisava de dinheiro para comprar um novo videogame

tokens.text: My days at the local pool
were mostly uneventful
However, one afternoon
something very scary happened
I saw a little girl
was not managing to keep her head

translation.text: não estava conseguindo manter a cabeça

tokens.text: above the water
I had been keeping an eye on her for a while

translation.text: Eu estava de olho nela há algum tempo

tokens.text: as she was around seven years old

translation.text: pois ela tinha cerca de sete anos

tokens.text: and was in the deepest part of the pool

translation.text: e estava na parte mais funda da piscina

tokens.text: She had a pink, inflatable pool float

translation.text: Ela tinha uma boia inflável rosa

tokens.text: and seemed to be having fun
playing alone
However, she somehow lost her pool float

translation.text: No entanto, ela de alguma forma perdeu a boia

tokens.text: and started drowning
I jumped into the pool
and swam in her direction
as fast as I could
I heard her parents screaming
as soon as I got her out of the water

translation.text: assim que a tirei da água

tokens.text: She seemed OK
just a little scared
so I just told her parents to give her plenty of water

translation.text: então eu apenas disse aos pais dela para lhe darem bastante água

tokens.text: let her rest
and seek medical attention
in case she experienced any symptoms
Then, I went inside the office
to fill out an incident report

translation.text: para preencher um relatório de incidente

tokens.text: Nothing else of notice
happened after that
The following day, however
I woke up to my family entering my room

translation.text: acordei com minha família entrando em meu quarto

tokens.text: I was scared
but realized no tragedy had happened

translation.text: mas percebi que nenhuma tragédia havia acontecido

tokens.text: because everyone was smiling
My sister was also waving a newspaper above her head.

translation.text: Minha irmã também estava agitando um jornal acima da cabeça

tokens.text: You are a hero!
Rose said, sitting on my bed, handing me the newspaper

translation.text: Rose disse, sentando na minha cama, me entregando o jornal

tokens.text: "What?" I asked
That did not make sense
They wrote a story about you

translation.text: Eles escreveram uma matéria sobre você

tokens.text: It's on page six
my mother said
So, I opened the newspaper to page six

translation.text: Então, abri o jornal na página seis

tokens.text: and read the following
"Diego Brown, a 17-year-old high school senior

translation.text: Diego Brown, um estudante do último ano do ensino médio de 17 anos

tokens.text: saved a little girl's life yesterday

translation.text: salvou a vida de uma menina ontem

tokens.text: Anna White, 7, was at the local pool

translation.text: Anna White, 7, estava na piscina local

tokens.text: when she lost her inflatable pool float
and started drowning
Brown, a medal-winning swimmer who works there as a lifeguard,

translation.text: Brown, um nadador medalhista que trabalha lá como salva-vidas

tokens.text: jumped to her rescue as soon as he realized what was happening

translation.text: saltou em seu socorro assim que percebeu o que estava acontecendo

tokens.text: He is our hero!
May White, the little girl's mother, told our reporter

translation.text: May White, a mãe da menina, disse ao nosso repórter

tokens.text: There was also a picture of Anna and her parents

translation.text: Havia também uma foto de Anna e seus pais

tokens.text: all smiling
I smiled, too
That's crazy
, I
'm not a hero
I was just doing my job,
I said
I was not pretending to be humble

translation.text: Eu não estava fingindo ser humilde

tokens.text: I really meant it
You may feel that way
but they still see you as a hero

translation.text: mas eles ainda o veem como um herói

tokens.text: my father said
I also see you as a hero,

translation.text: Eu também vejo você como um herói

tokens.text: he added
I did not know what to say

translation.text: Eu não sabia o que dizer

tokens.text: so I just kept smiling
So, this is the story of how I overcame my fear of pools.

translation.text: Então, esta é a história de como superei meu medo de piscinas

tokens.text: It is also the story of how I became a hero.

translation.text: É também a história de como me tornei um herói.
